welcome.headline:
Accomplish.
Not just plan.
welcome.description: ACTIO acts with you when it matters most. Smart reminders. Direct actions. Never an ignored reminder.

permissions.title: ACTIO needs a few permissions.
permissions.description: ACTIO needs these permissions to work at its best. They're all optional, but make sure to grant at least battery and notifications — they ensure your alarms always ring.
permissions.noDataShared: No data is shared with third parties.

battery.title: Battery
battery.subtitle: Required for reliable alarms
battery.description: Some Android phones cut background apps to save battery. Without this exception, your alarms may not ring after the phone has been idle for a while.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Receive your reminders on time
notifications.description: Without notifications, your reminders and alarms won't be able to reach you. It's the main channel ACTIO uses to communicate with you.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Add your guarantors in one tap
contacts.description: Easily find your existing guarantors in your contacts to add them without re-entering their information.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Sync your tasks
calendar.description: Display your ACTIO tasks directly in your regular calendar to keep an overview of your week.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Trigger alarms when you arrive
location.description: Set location-based alarms that fire automatically when you arrive somewhere. Example: "When I get to the hardware store, remind me to call the contractor."

disable.title: Disable this permission
disable.message: To disable it, go to your phone's settings.

denied.title: Permission denied
denied.message: You can enable it later from your phone's settings.

blocked.title: Permission blocked
blocked.message: You've denied this permission multiple times. To enable it, you need to go to your phone's settings.

garant.title: Your human safety net.
garant.description: When you miss an important reminder, your Guarantor automatically receives an alert via ACTIO.

autoMessage.label: AUTOMATIC MESSAGE
autoMessage.preview: {{salutation}}, {{userName}} hasn't validated the reminder '{{reminder}}' for {{delay}}. Please check if everything is okay.
